item.title: Favoto Bicycle Helmets Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Head Injury; Violate Mandatory Standard for Bicycle Helmets; Sold on Amazon by Favoto
item.company: Online at Amazon.com from April 2022 through January 2026 for between $20 and $27.
item.brand: Online at Amazon.com from April 2022 through January 2026 for between $20 and $27.
item.summary: This recall involves Favoto Model H-1 bike helmets. The helmet body is black with red stripes, black padding, black straps with a silver reflective pattern in the center and a black and red buckle with a black chin strap. The recalled helmets were sold in youth size large (L). The helmets have a black plastic knob at the back of the helmet for adjusting the fitting. "FAVOTO" can be found in white letters on the side of the helmet.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Favoto Bike Helmets.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the helmets immediately and contact Favoto for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to destroy the recalled helmet by cutting the straps and write "Recalled" and email a photo of the destroyed helmet to safety@favoto.com.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
